description: Cloud Run cost jumps because a staging rollout set min-instances=100 on 8 services and shipped to production.

root_cause.summary: min-instances=100 accidentally promoted from staging to prod across 8 Cloud Run services — each now keeps 100 warm containers 24/7 regardless of traffic.
root_cause.remediation: Roll back to min-instances=0 (or 1 for latency-sensitive services). Add an admission controller / Terraform review rule that flags min-instances > 5.
